CANTO II Start Up, Shut Down and Cleaning Procedures 

 

Before Your Samples 

Check sheath tank and waste tank level. 

Turn on cytometer (green button on left side), then power on computer. 

Computer login password: BDIS 

Software login: Set with staff. 

If first user of the day: Cytometry> Fluidics Start Up. This will take about 7 minutes.  

Wash with 2% Contrad (detergent), followed by Milli-Q water. 

After Your Samples 

Wash with 2% Contrad for 5 minutes. 

Wash with water for 3 minutes. 

Logout of Diva, without fluidics shutdown. 

Refill sheath tank, if needed. 

Empty waste tank, if needed. 

If you are last person  

Close Diva, choose “Log Out with Fluidics Shutdown.” This process will take about 5 minutes. 

Turn off cytometer (green button on left side) and computer. 

 

Data Management:  

Name the Experiment:        yyyy-mm-dd_Your Name_any words 

Export as “Experiment” 

Store in D drive, Experiments > PI Folder > Your Folder 

Only leave 3 Experiments under your account.  Delete the rest. 

Back up your data.  Flow lab is not responsible for missing data. 

 

Emergency Contacts:
